Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The LogMessage method writes a message to the attached Windows console, applying a severity-specific text colour while the message is written.

Note.Paragraph: If no console handle is open, the method returns without writing output.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void LogMessage(const char* scope, size_t scopeLength, ILogger::Severity severity, const char* message, size_t messageLength) override;

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: A pointer to the UTF-8 scope string.
The number of bytes in the scope string.
The severity assigned to the message.
A pointer to the UTF-8 message string.
The number of bytes in the message string.
